chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D – 7025 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Disposed of matter: For hearing of CMA No.23036/2024 26.08.2025 M/s. Darvesh K. Mandhan & Rana Sakhawat Ali, Advocates for the Petitioners. Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, Advocate for Respondents No.2, 3 & 4. -------------------------------------- This petition was disposed of vide order dated 14.11.2022. Consequent thereof the Petitioners deposited the undisputed quantum of dues and taxes with the Nazir of this Court. The principal amount of securities furnished by the Petitioners to the Nazir have already been released and discharged in the favour of the Petitioners. The Petitioners vide instant application have only sought the profit accumulated on the securities furnished earlier. Nazir’s report dated 02.11.2024 is on record which states the amount of profit accumulated and lying with the Nazir. Learned counsel for the respondents/Customs extended his no objection to the grant of the application. Accordingly, the application is allowed as prayed. Nazir to release the amount stated in the above noted report, along with any further accumulation. JUDGE JUDGE Nadeem
